title: Bedrock - Rekt
relevance_summary: Native token handling vulnerability allowing unlimited minting of uniBTC tokens

prevention.rule: Block any tx that attempts to mint uniBTC using native tokens on non-native BTC chains.

red_flags: Failure to handle native tokens on non-native BTC chains
summary: Bedrock's uniBTC vault suffered a $2 million loss due to a vulnerability where the smart contracts failed to handle native tokens on non-native BTC chains, allowing unlimited minting of uniBTC tokens.
